name: Configure car
description:
For each vehicle there must be availableĀa complete configuration. This configuration must be selectable.
Invalid configurations must not be offered as user choice.

name: Allow discount
description: The sales person must be able to give the buyer an individualĀdiscount.

name: Automatic discount
description: When putting together the add-ons, the adjustment of automatic discount levels must be possible.

name: Dealer allows discount
description: The sales person must be able to give the buyer an individualĀdiscount. This discount must not respond to other prices reduced by other discounts.

name: Continuous price display
description: The user must always be able to identify the actual prize of the current selected vehicle configuration.

name: Arbitrary use sequence
description: The user must not be forced to do the selection of a vehicle configuration in a fixed sequence. The selection process must be commodious.

name: Immediate price calculation
description: When the user changes the configuration the consequences for the prize must be identifiable at once.

name: Source of basic data
description: The necessary basic data of anĀautomobile manufacturer must be importable.

name: File import
description: All necessary basic data to configure a vehicle must be importable from a configurations file.

name: Import from OEM host
description: All necessary basic data to configure a vehicle must be importable from a host system of an automobile manufacturer. The imported dataĀmust be checked during online import.

name: normal use
description: Design requirements regarding the normal use of the application.

name: Valid configuration
description: The user must be able to notice at any timeĀif he has selected a valid vehicle configuration. Thereby means "valid" "can be ordered" from the seller.

name: administration
description: Design requirements regarding the administration of the application.

name: Input of basic data
description: The data, necessary for vehicle configurations, must be given in separate and protected dialogs.
